message: linefill has no single-handle chartlang analogue
suggestion: Cap the collection with a `max_*_count` argument or a ring-buffer eviction.

message: Script emits only drawings; converted as a `defineDrawing` (plot capability dropped).
suggestion: Add a `plot(...)` call if the script should remain a `defineIndicator`.

message: `linefill.new` over ring-buffer elements has no chartlang analogue (Camp C territory).
suggestion: Draw the fill as an explicit `draw.rectangle`/`draw.frame` instead.

message: `linefill.new` across two collections has no chartlang analogue.
suggestion: linefill across two collections has no chartlang analogue. Consider a single `draw.path(...)` over the pair of anchor points instead.
